description: This video explains the concept of blockchain as a trustless system, highlighting its implications such as security, redundancy, immutability, trustlessness, and transparency.
topic_summary: Blockchain is described as a trustless system that ensures security, redundancy, and immutability. Users can verify data without needing to trust others, as each has a copy of the blockchain [t=0:24 - t=0:37].
aliases: What Does It Mean That Blockchain Is A Trustless System
